problem_solved: Healthcare systems lack tools and frameworks to systematically address social determinants of health and advocate for health equity
solution_description: Nonprofit organization providing SDOH screening tools, resource directories, and advocacy for health equity. Works with health systems to integrate social care into clinical workflows. Provides training, technical assistance, and policy advocacy for addressing root causes of health disparities
traction_signals: Published SDOH screening frameworks widely adopted
National advocacy for health equity policies
notes: Mission-driven nonprofit, not a commercial platform. Pioneered SDOH work in healthcare settings. Provides thought leadership and frameworks but not scalable tech solution. Low Varden fit - nonprofit model, limited commercial opportunity
